rows.yaml:
collection: SOC Workflows
playbooks:
  - name: Approve or Reject Decision Gate
    description: Manual trigger that presents an Approve / Reject prompt. Each choice stamps a verdict variable.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Start
        next: Analyst Decision

      - type: manual_input
        name: Analyst Decision
        arguments:
          title: "Approve or Reject?"
          description: "Review the request and choose an action. Optionally add a comment before submitting."
          inputs:
            - name: comment
              kind: textarea        # most specific kind for free-form prose
              label: Analyst Comment
              required: false
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true           # highlighted button
            next: Stamp Approved
          - display: Reject
            next: Stamp Rejected

      - type: set_variable
        name: Stamp Approved
        vars:
          verdict: approved
          analyst_comment: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.comment }}"
        next: End Approved

      - type: set_variable
        name: Stamp Rejected
        vars:
          verdict: rejected
          analyst_comment: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.comment }}"
        next: End Rejected

      - type: end
        name: End Approved

      - type: end
        name: End Rejected

matches_example.detail: compiled JSON differs from the reference example

rows.yaml:
collection: SOC Playbooks
playbooks:
  - name: Confirm Before Block
    description: Presents a manual approval gate to the SOC analyst before executing a block action. Approve routes to an action-recorded step; Reject routes to a cancellation step.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Start
        next: Confirm Block Decision

      - type: manual_input
        name: Confirm Block Decision
        arguments:
          title: "Approve Block Action?"
          description: |
            A block action has been requested. Please review the details below and choose whether to proceed.

            **Action**: Block the identified entity
            **Requested by**: Automated Detection Pipeline

            Click **Approve** to execute the block, or **Reject** to cancel.
          inputs:
            - name: analyst_comment
              kind: textarea
              label: Analyst Comment
              tooltip: "Optional — add any notes about this decision."
              required: false
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true
            next: Record Approved Action
          - display: Reject
            next: Record Rejected Action

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Approved Action
        vars:
          block_decision: "approved"
          analyst_comment: "{{ vars.steps.Confirm_Block_Decision.input.analyst_comment }}"
          decision_timestamp: "{{ arrow.utcnow().isoformat() }}"
        message:
          content: |
            ✅ **Block Approved** by SOC analyst.
            **Comment**: {{ vars.steps.Confirm_Block_Decision.input.analyst_comment | default('(none)') }}
          tags:
            - block_approved
            - manual_review
        next: End Approved

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Rejected Action
        vars:
          block_decision: "rejected"
          analyst_comment: "{{ vars.steps.Confirm_Block_Decision.input.analyst_comment }}"
          decision_timestamp: "{{ arrow.utcnow().isoformat() }}"
        message:
          content: |
            ❌ **Block Rejected** by SOC analyst.
            **Comment**: {{ vars.steps.Confirm_Block_Decision.input.analyst_comment | default('(none)') }}
          tags:
            - block_rejected
            - manual_review
        next: End Rejected

      - type: end
        name: End Approved

      - type: end
        name: End Rejected

I'll check whether this connector actually exists before authoring anything.
❌ **Connector not found — stopping here.**

The connector `totally-made-up-connector` does not exist in the FortiSOAR connector catalog. The search returned **zero matches**, and the closest fuzzy alternatives (`zscaler-client-connector`, `otbase-inventory`, `nmap-scanner`) are clearly unrelated.

---

### What you should do

1. **Verify the connector name.** Check the exact name as it appears in your FortiSOAR instance under **Automation → Connectors**. Connector IDs are lowercase, hyphen-separated slugs (e.g. `virustotal`, `microsoft-sentinel`, `fortigate`).

2. **Search with a keyword.** If you're unsure of the exact slug, tell me a keyword — the vendor name, product category, or capability — and I'll search for it:
   > *"Find me a connector that can block IPs on a firewall"*
   > *"Is there a connector for Splunk?"*

3. **Check if it's installed.** Even if a connector exists in the catalog, it must be installed and configured on your FSR instance. I can check that too — just give me a real connector name.

4. **Custom connectors.** If `totally-made-up-connector` is a custom/private connector built in-house, it won't appear in the public catalog. In that case, share the connector's `info.json` or operation list and I can author the playbook against it directly.

---

I intentionally did **not** fabricate a connector definition or produce any YAML — doing so would create a playbook that fails at runtime with a "connector not found" error.

rows.yaml:
collection: SOC Playbooks
playbooks:
  - name: FortiGate IP Block or Allow
    description: Prompts analyst for an IP address and action (block/allow). On block, uses FortiGate block_ip_new (Quarantine Based) to block the IP. On allow, logs a note.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Start
        next: Get Analyst Decision

      - type: manual_input
        name: Get Analyst Decision
        arguments:
          title: "IP Address Block / Allow Decision"
          description: "Enter the IP address to act on and choose whether to block or allow it."
          inputs:
            - name: ip_address
              kind: ipv4
              label: IP Address
              required: true
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: Action
              required: true
              options:
                - block
                - allow
        options:
          - display: Submit
            primary: true
            next: Check Analyst Action

      - type: decision
        name: Check Analyst Action
        conditions:
          - display: Block
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Get_Analyst_Decision.input.action == 'block' }}"
            next: Block IP on FortiGate
          - display: Allow
            default: true
            next: Log Allow Decision

      - type: connector
        name: Block IP on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ''
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.steps.Get_Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }}"
            time_to_live: "12 Hour"
        next: Log Block Result

      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Block Result
        vars:
          block_status: "Blocked {{ vars.steps.Get_Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }} on FortiGate via quarantine."
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Allow Decision
        vars:
          allow_note: "Analyst chose to ALLOW {{ vars.steps.Get_Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }}. No block action taken."
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End

collection: Phishing Response
playbooks:
  - name: Phishing Alert - IP Reputation Check and Block
    description: >
      On phishing alert creation, scores every IP in sender_ips via VirusTotal.
      If any score exceeds 50, asks an analyst to Block or Skip. On Block,
      quarantines the high-score IPs via FortiGate. Always posts a summary
      comment to the alert.
    is_active: true
    steps:

      # ── Trigger ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: start_on_create
        name: Phishing Alert Created
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: name
                op: contains
                value: phishing
        next: Score All IPs

      # ── Loop: score every IP via VirusTotal ─────────────────────────────────
      - type: connector
        name: Score All IPs
        for_each:
          item: "{{ vars.input.records[0].sender_ips }}"
          parallel: false
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ''
          params:
            ip: "{{ vars.item }}"
        next: Collect High Score IPs

      # ── Collect IPs whose reputation > 50 ───────────────────────────────────
      - type: set_variable
        name: Collect High Score IPs
        vars:
          high_score_ips: >-
            {{ vars.steps.Score_All_IPs
               | selectattr('reputation', 'defined')
               | selectattr('reputation', 'gt', 50)
               | map(attribute='ip')
               | list }}
          scored_summary: >-
            {{ vars.steps.Score_All_IPs
               | map(attribute='ip') | list
               | zip(vars.steps.Score_All_IPs | map(attribute='reputation') | list)
               | list }}
        next: Any High Score IP

      # ── Branch: any IP above threshold? ─────────────────────────────────────
      - type: decision
        name: Any High Score IP
        conditions:
          - display: "Yes — score above 50 found"
            when: "{{ vars.high_score_ips | length > 0 }}"
            next: Analyst Block Decision
          - display: "No — all scores safe"
            default: true
            next: Post Summary Comment

      # ── Manual input: ask analyst ────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: manual_input
        name: Analyst Block Decision
        arguments:
          title: "High-Risk IPs Detected"
          description: >-
            The following IPs scored above 50 on VirusTotal and may be malicious.
            Please review and choose an action.

            **High-score IPs:** {{ vars.high_score_ips | join(', ') }}
          inputs:
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: "Action to take"
              required: true
              options:
                - Block
                - Skip
        options:
          - display: Block
            primary: true
            next: Analyst Chose Block
          - display: Skip
            next: Analyst Chose Block

      # ── Branch: what did the analyst choose? ────────────────────────────────
      - type: decision
        name: Analyst Chose Block
        conditions:
          - display: Block
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Block_Decision.input.action == 'Block' }}"
            next: Block High Score IPs
          - display: Skip
            default: true
            next: Post Summary Comment

      # ── FortiGate: quarantine every high-score IP ────────────────────────────
      - type: connector
        name: Block High Score IPs
        for_each:
          item: "{{ vars.high_score_ips }}"
          parallel: false
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ''
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.item }}"
            time_to_live: 1 Day
        next: Post Summary Comment

      # ── Final comment on the alert ───────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: set_variable
        name: Post Summary Comment
        vars:
          _action_taken: >-
            {% if vars.high_score_ips | length > 0 %}
              {% if vars.steps.Analyst_Block_Decision.input.action == 'Block' %}
                Blocked on FortiGate (Quarantine, 1 Day)
              {% else %}
                Analyst chose to Skip — no block applied
              {% endif %}
            {% else %}
              No IPs exceeded the score threshold — no action required
            {% endif %}
        message:
          content: >-
            **Phishing IP Reputation Summary**

            | IP Address | VT Reputation Score |
            |---|---|
            {% for item in vars.steps.Score_All_IPs %}
            | {{ item.ip }} | {{ item.reputation }} |
            {% endfor %}

            **Action taken:** {{ vars._action_taken }}

            **High-risk IPs (score > 50):** {{ vars.high_score_ips | join(', ') or 'None' }}
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End
